name: BCRD Indoor Gym at the Community Campus in Hailey
description: BCRD Indoor Gym at the Community Campus in Hailey is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hailey, ID. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Blaine County Recreation District (BCRD)
description: Come play pickleball at Blaine County Recreation District (BCRD) in Hailey, ID! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
